results.name: imminent death
results.description: Things that are about to meet their (usually untimely) demise.

results.name: impact effect
results.description: Effects that have your creatures do ETB damage or life loss.

results.name: imperium (faction)
results.description: The Imperium of Man of the 40K universe.

results.name: improbable weapon
results.description: Fantasy weapons that aren't actually all that practical.

results.name: improvised weapon
results.description: Things that aren't meant to be weapons being used as weapons.

results.name: impulse
results.description: Look at the top N cards and put 1+ of them into your hand. Not to be confused with Red's pseudo-card-draw effect, [impulsive draw](/tags/card/impulsive-draw).

results.name: impulsive curiosity
results.description: Exile your cards when a creature deals damage to an opponent, and you can play them for a limited duration.

results.name: impulsive draw
results.description: Cards which let you cast a card for a limited time off the top of a library (via exile). Use it or lose it. Typically a red card advantage mechanic. For the effect seen on the [card Impulse](/card/vis/34), see the [tag impulse](/tags/card/impulse).

results.name: impulsive recursion
results.description: Sends cards to exile from the graveyard and you can cast them for a limited time. Similar to [Impulsive Draw](/tags/card/impulsive-draw), but from the graveyard, not the library.

results.name: indatha
results.description:
The white-black-green-aligned triome of Ikoria.
Swampy pools within lowland plains, dotted with uniquely shaped trees.

results.name: indefinite effect
results.description: Effects that last forever, sometimes tracked, sometimes untracked.
